name: Creme De Menthe Cheesecake Squares
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a medium bowl, combine the crust ingredients; mix well.
Press into the bottom of an ungreased 13 x 9 inch pan. Freeze the crust while preparing the filling.
In a large bowl, combine all filling ingredients; beat on low speed until smooth. Pour into the crust-lined pan and bake for 30 to 35 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool.
Melt chocolate in a double boiler. Let cool for 5 minutes; then beat in sour cream. Spread over warm cheesecake.
Refrigerate for 3 hours or until firm.
20 servings. Calories: Fat g
